ddls:
CREATE TABLE "substation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the substation where the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was recorded */,
  "t_sec" INTEGER /* Time in seconds within the hour when the data was recorded */,
  "s1_kva" REAL /* Power consumption or generation in kVA for phase 1 */,
  "ang1" REAL /* Angle in degrees for phase 1 */,
  "s2_kva" REAL /* Power consumption or generation in kVA for phase 2 */,
  "ang2" REAL /* Angle in degrees for phase 2 */,
  "s3_kva" REAL /* Power consumption or generation in kVA for phase 3 */,
  "ang3" REAL /* Angle in degrees for phase 3 */,
  "voltage_level" TEXT /* The voltage level at which the substation operates */,
  "frequency" REAL /* The frequency of the power supply */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* The power factor */,
  "status" TEXT /* The operational status of the substation */,
  "grid_stability_index" REAL /* A metric indicating the stability of the grid at the substation */,
  "load_shedding_status" INTEGER /* Whether load shedding is in effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substation_data_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substations ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substations" (
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substation */,
  "substation_name" TEXT /* Name of the substation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the substation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the substation */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date when the substation was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "capacity_kva" REAL /* The total capacity of the substation in kVA */,
  "type" TEXT /* The type of substation */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* The current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for quick contact */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* A foreign key to a roles table to normalize roles */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., substation data, reports) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the access attempt was successful */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the substation where the weather data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather data was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* The amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* The percentage of cloud cover */,
  "pressure" REAL /* The atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* The visibility in meters */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* A description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substations ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the substation the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* The format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substations ("substation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is sent to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., alert, update, maintenance) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the notification */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the notification */,
  "action_required" INTEGER /* Whether action is required */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_correlation" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation data point */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the substation the correlation is about */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the power system data point */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data point */,
  "correlation_score" REAL /* Correlation score between the power system data and the weather data */,
  "correlation_description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation */,
  "correlation_type" TEXT /* The type of correlation */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval of the correlation */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data used for the correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_correlation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES substation_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_correlation_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_correlation_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substations ("substation_id")
)
